story.text:
# 💡 Drake → Dragon Transformation
**concept** · shared · knowledge

The arc from Drake's multiplicative filter P·C·Q·S (any zero kills everything) to Dragon's V(π,t) manifold (geometric trajectory through 64-vertex lattice). Same skeleton, full manifold. Tale 18 is the bridge — every head of the Toxic Waste Dragon is a path where V(π,t) collapses to zero. The 30 Zero tales walk this transformation.
> *The Dragon is the Drake that learned it contained geometry.*

## Edges in

- [[ZK Tale 30: Eternal Sovereignty 🌕]] *narrates* →
- [[ZK Tale 18: Toxic Waste Dragon 🌕]] *narrates* →
